methodology: Placement optimization using SCAN spatial attention weights for spillover modeling, Random Forest feature importance for need assessment, MiroFish agent simulation for adoption likelihood and sentiment, and graph centrality analysis for network effects. Geographic diversity enforced via diminishing returns on co-located resources.

resource.name: Community Health Center
resource.description: Federally qualified health center with sliding fee scale

top_barriers: stigma around mental health services
cost concerns despite sliding fee scale
transportation costs to get to the health center
concerns about not speaking fluent english and navigating the center
feeling overwhelmed with multiple health issues at once

featured_quotes.quote: Maybe this health center can finally get me the help I need to manage my weight and depression, it's been so hard to take care of myself and my kids on my own.
A community health center right here in Jacksonville would be a blessing, especially with the pharmacy on site, it'll make managing my meds so much easier
This health center is a game-changer for me and my community; I finally have a chance to prioritize my health without breaking the bank.
This Community Health Center might be just what I need to get my health back on track after years of struggling with arthritis!

report.summary: Place a Community Health Center in ZIP 32209 (ZIP 32209). This serves 34,657 residents in a neighborhood with life expectancy of 68.7 years and RDCS of 0.91.
rationale: Highest composite need score (0.60) for healthcare resources among eligible ZIPs
Unique MiroFish simulation (15 agents) projects 100% adoption rate with avg sentiment +0.76, 24 weekly visits
Spatial spillover benefits adjacent neighborhoods: ZIP 32202, ZIP 32204, ZIP 32205
Projected +0.4 years life expectancy gain at $14,588/life-year saved

resource.name: Community Grocery Co-op
resource.description: Member-owned grocery with subsidized healthy food

top_barriers: cost for membership is still a bit out of my budget
transportation to and from store via bus is still a concern
depression and obesity make it hard to motivate myself sometimes
transportation to get there is still a challenge, even though it's located nearby.
my medication and doctor's appointments can make it tough to plan visits there often.

featured_quotes.quote: This community grocery co-op seems like a game-changer for me and my neighbors in Westside Jacksonville - we can finally get healthy food at a price we can afford.
This community grocery co-op sounds like a blessing from heaven, I just hope I can make it work for us.
This community grocery co-op sounds like a godsend - I'm definitely going to join and start shopping there regularly.
As a retired teacher, I'm excited about the prospect of shopping at a community-owned grocery co-op that promotes healthy eating and education - it's just what our neighborhood needs!

resource.name: Urban Wellness Park
resource.description: 50-acre park with recreation center and fitness classes

top_barriers: bus transportation can be irregular and unreliable, making it hard to get to the park, especially with my little ones in tow.
i'm not sure i can afford the gym membership or fitness classes on my tight budget.
i struggle with mobility issues due to my weight and don't know if the walking trails or outdoor gym are accessible for me.
transportation issues, need a ride to get there
concerns about safety due to past experiences in the neighborhood

featured_quotes.quote: This Urban Wellness Park could be just what I need to get back on my feet, especially with the walking trails and outdoor gym, it's a blessing for our community.
I'm really excited about the Urban Wellness Park - it's exactly what we need in this area to get healthy and active!
This new Urban Wellness Park will be a wonderful addition to our community, I'm excited to see what the after-school programs can do for the local youth.
This urban wellness park would be a total game-changer for our community, especially with the after-school programs and outdoor gym!
